description_long: This house is part of a walled residential property featuring a main building with a blue gable roof, a secondary green-roofed structure, and a detached garage or utility building. The property is surrounded by a gray perimeter wall and includes a paved driveway with multiple parking spaces and tree-lined walkways. The main house has a prominent entryway, visible windows, and a small porch area. The landscaping includes rows of evenly spaced trees along the driveway and the street, providing a sense of order and greenery. The overall layout suggests a suburban or semi-urban setting with a focus on privacy and accessibility.
description: A walled residential property with a blue-roofed house, secondary buildings, paved driveways, and tree-lined landscaping.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the property from an angle, highlighting the blue-roofed main house, green-roofed secondary building, and the perimeter wall.
description_view_1: View 1 presents a frontal perspective, emphasizing the main entryway, driveway, and the symmetrical rows of trees along the street.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the side of the property, revealing the arrangement of the buildings and the driveway leading to the garage.
description_view_3: View 3 offers a rear view, focusing on the backyard area, the back of the main house, and the tree-lined street behind the property.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a small porch, steps, and a simple overhang, flanked by windows and accessible from the driveway.
